title: YesStyle CECILIA010: Reward Code
description: Practical guide to using the YesStyle influencer reward code CECILIA010. Discover how it differs from regular coupons, learn how to stack discounts, and check K-beauty and customs tips.
metaDescription: Use CECILIA010 on YesStyle for an extra 5% off and stack it with coupons on K-beauty, Korean skincare and fashion.
imageAlt: Korean skincare and K-beauty products from YesStyle beautifully arranged on a bright table.
pros: Influencer code that adds an extra 5% off on top of active coupons
Can be combined with any active coupon code on the site
Free international shipping on orders over US$ 59
Vast catalog of K-Beauty, J-Beauty, and Korean fashion
Site version available in English for international shoppers
cons: Does not replace standard coupon codes (applied in a separate field)
International orders may be subject to customs duties depending on your location
International shipping times (10 to 25 business days for standard method)
Final billing in USD (subject to bank exchange rates)

contentSections.heading: How the code CECILIA010 works
paragraphs: Unlike traditional coupon codes which apply a direct discount alone, the code CECILIA010 on YesStyle works as a "Reward Code" (influencer code).

The main advantage is that it has a separate and dedicated field at checkout. This means it is stackable: you can use it at the same time with any active coupon code on the site, adding the 5% off offered by CECILIA010 to your savings.
bullets: Code: CECILIA010
Discount: 5% extra
Type: Influencer Code / Reward Code
Where to use: "Reward Code" field at YesStyle checkout
Benefit: Adds 5% extra to your cart when applied in the correct field
Stackable: YES! You can use CECILIA010 + any active coupon on the same order
Validity: Permanent (always active and verified)
contentSections.emphasis: Cecilia Tip: The code CECILIA010 does not cancel YesStyle promo coupons — it adds 5% on top of them! Always fill both discount fields at checkout to maximize your savings.

contentSections.heading: What is YesStyle?
paragraphs: YesStyle is one of the world's largest and most trusted e-commerce platforms for Korean skincare (K-beauty), Japanese beauty (J-beauty), Asian fashion, and accessories. Founded in 2006 and based in Hong Kong, the company has become a global destination for authentic products.

YesStyle ships to over 80 countries, providing localized currency conversion to make shopping easier. Its catalog is massive: thousands of skincare products, cosmetics, trendy clothing, and lifestyle items.
contentSections.imageAlt: YesStyle homepage showing K-beauty promotional banner and featured items.
contentSections.imageCaption: YesStyle brings together promotional campaigns, authentic K-beauty products, and direct shipping.
bullets: K-Beauty: glass skin serums, essences, toners, sunscreens, and everything for the famous Asian skincare routine
Asian & Korean Fashion: clothing, shoes, bags, and accessories inspired by Seoul and Tokyo urban trends
J-Beauty & Wellness: renowned Japanese brands (like Hada Labo) and health supplements

contentSections.heading: K-Beauty: the global skincare phenomenon
paragraphs: Korean beauty (K-beauty) has taken the global skincare market by storm. What started as a niche trend has now become a central part of beauty routines worldwide.

Consumers are highly drawn to the "glass skin" effect (luminous, intensely hydrated, and clear skin). Ingredients like Centella Asiatica, Niacinamida, Snail Mucin, and Hyaluronic Acid are widely sought after. YesStyle is one of the most reliable and affordable ways to source these authentic products directly from Asian manufacturers.
contentSections.imageAlt: YesStyle region categories for Japanese beauty, Chinese beauty, and Southeast Asian beauty.
contentSections.imageCaption: Beyond K-beauty, YesStyle organizes products by region and J-beauty trends.
bullets: Glass skin: intensely hydrated, radiant, and even-toned skin
Korean routine: focused on steps like double cleansing, hydrating toners, and nourishing essences
Key ingredients: centella asiatica, snail mucin, propolis, and hyaluronic acid
contentSections.emphasis: Cecilia Tip: Shopping on YesStyle is one of the safest ways to get genuine K-beauty, as they buy directly from brands and offer a far wider selection than local resellers.

contentSections.heading: Reward Code vs. Coupon Code: the difference you need to know
paragraphs: To avoid mistakes at checkout, you need to understand that YesStyle uses two different categories of promotional codes that can be stacked together in the same order:
bullets: Reward Code (CECILIA010): This is the influencer code. It must be entered in the "Reward Code" field and adds 5% extra to your order. Any benefit beyond this discount depends on YesStyle's active terms and should not be guaranteed.
Coupon Code (active promo codes): These change regularly based on monthly promotions and site campaigns. If there is a coupon available, it must be entered in the "Coupon Code" field.

contentSections.heading: How to use the code CECILIA010 on YesStyle: step-by-step
paragraphs: Follow this step-by-step guide to stack discounts at checkout. Remember to apply the code CECILIA010 and check if there are any active coupons on the site.

contentSections.heading: 1. Go to the official YesStyle website
paragraphs: Open the official YesStyle website (yesstyle.com) and log in to your account to ensure your order collects Elite Club points.

contentSections.heading: 2. Choose your products and add them to your shopping bag
paragraphs: Browse the categories of K-Beauty skincare, makeup, or fashion, and add items to your shopping bag. Check the minimum order value required for free shipping to your country (typically around US$ 59).
contentSections.imageAlt: YesStyle shopping bag showing products, free shipping option, and coupon fields.
contentSections.imageCaption: In your bag, check your items, shipping options, and code fields before proceeding to checkout.

contentSections.heading: 3. Enter the Reward Code CECILIA010
paragraphs: At checkout or in your shopping bag, find the field labeled "Reward Code" and enter: CECILIA010. Click "Apply" to validate and activate the 5% extra discount.
contentSections.imageAlt: YesStyle checkout screen with separate fields for Coupon Code and Reward Code.
contentSections.imageCaption: Enter CECILIA010 in the dedicated Reward Code box, separate from the coupon code field.

contentSections.heading: 4. Enter the active monthly Coupon Code
paragraphs: Find the field labeled "Coupon Code" and enter any active promo code available on the site. Click "Apply" to combine this coupon with the 5% extra from CECILIA010.

contentSections.heading: 5. Review your discounts and place the order
paragraphs: Confirm that both discount layers (reward code + coupon code) are shown in your order summary and deducted from the subtotal. Complete your shipping details, select your payment method, and place your order.
contentSections.emphasis: Attention: Make sure you enter CECILIA010 and the active coupon in their correct fields. If you attempt to enter the influencer reward code in the coupon field, the site will show an error.

contentSections.heading: How to stack the code with coupons
paragraphs: Discount stacking means filling both main fields at checkout: the reward code box and the coupon code box. To ensure a safe order, apply CECILIA010 in the Reward Code field, and apply any active promotional code in the Coupon Code field.
bullets: Step 1 — Reward Code: enter CECILIA010 in the Reward Code field to add the 5% extra.
Step 2 — Active Coupon: enter any valid site coupon in the Coupon Code field.
Step 3 — Final check: verify in your order summary that both the 5% discount from CECILIA010 and the active coupon are listed before paying.
contentSections.imageAlt: YesStyle order summary showing both coupon code and CECILIA010 applied.
contentSections.imageCaption: In your summary, both discounts should appear separately: the active coupon and CECILIA010.
contentSections.emphasis: Cecilia Tip: Do not place your order just because a code was accepted. Always double-check the final summary to ensure the discount is reflected in the final total before paying.

contentSections.heading: How to find active YesStyle coupons
paragraphs: YesStyle offers regular coupons that change frequently. The most common types include welcome coupons, return coupons, seasonal coupons, category coupons, and free shipping codes.

Since these coupon codes change often, the safest approach is to check the promotions page on the YesStyle website before finishing your purchase. Apply the active coupon in the "Coupon Code" field and keep CECILIA010 in the "Reward Code" field.
bullets: Flash Sales: promotional markdowns of up to 50% off for a limited time
Lucky Bundles: product packages at reduced prices
Daily Free: complimentary items with minimum purchases
Elite Club: loyalty program with progressive discounts
Friend Rewards: refer friends to earn shopping credit
Student Program: special discounts for students

contentSections.heading: What to buy on YesStyle: guide by category
paragraphs: YesStyle has a huge catalog. Here are the main categories for reference:
bullets: K-Beauty & Korean Skincare: COSRX (Snail Mucin Essence, Low pH Good Morning Gel Cleanser), Beauty of Joseon (Dynasty Cream, Relief Sun), Anua (Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner), Laneige (Water Sleeping Mask, Lip Sleeping Mask), Isntree (Hyaluronic Acid Watery Sun Gel), TIRTIR (Mask Fit Red Cushion), medicube (Zero Pore Pads), AXIS-Y (Dark Spot Correcting Glow Serum), Dr.Melaxin, House of Hur.
Korean Makeup: ETUDE (eyeshadows, blushes), CLIO (foundations, eyeliners), Peripera (tints, mascaras), Judydoll, fwee, nuse.
Korean Fashion: minimal and elegant styles, neutral colors, oversized cuts, versatile basics (casual clothes, dresses, blazers, wide-leg trousers, shoes, bags).
J-Beauty (Japanese Beauty): Hada Labo, DHC, Kose, Shiseido (focus on hydration layers, prevention, and anti-aging).
Chinese Beauty (C-Beauty): rising Chinese cosmetic brands with accessible prices and traditional ingredient formulas.
Health & Wellness: collagen, vitamins, proteins, hair and nail care products.
Accessories & Lifestyle: hair clips, headbands, bags, pattern socks, phone cases, home decor.

contentSections.heading: Shipping and delivery
paragraphs: Free shipping is available for most destinations on orders over US$ 59 (sometimes reduced to US$ 35 during specific campaigns). Standard shipping includes international tracking.
Delivery times depend on your destination: Standard shipping typically takes 10 to 25 business days, while Express shipping takes 5 to 10 business days depending on customs processing in your region.
bullets: Tracking: a tracking code is provided for all orders and can be accessed in your email or YesStyle account
Final delivery: handled by your local postal service or partner carrier
Customs: packages may spend a few days in customs clearance

contentSections.heading: Customs and import taxes
paragraphs: International purchases may be subject to customs inspection, import taxes, administrative fees, or other import clearance costs depending on your country. Consider these potential costs when planning your order.

According to YesStyle's stated policies, orders under US$ 1,000 may be eligible for a refund of customs duties and fees related to clearance, provided you pay the fees first, keep a valid receipt, and submit a refund claim within 30 days. This refund is issued as YesStyle Store Credit when approved.
bullets: Keep receipts for any customs charges paid in your country
Submit your refund claim through YesStyle customer service within 30 days
Refunds are not automatic and depend on the active rules of YesStyle's policy
Orders of US$ 1,000 or more are not covered by this refund policy
Refunds are issued as YesStyle Store Credit, not as direct cash back to your payment card
contentSections.emphasis: Cecilia Tip: Check YesStyle's official help pages regarding customs refunds before ordering, as import regulations and store policies can change.

contentSections.heading: FAQ — Frequently asked questions about CECILIA010 and YesStyle
paragraphs: Common questions and answers regarding the code and shopping on YesStyle:
bullets: Is CECILIA010 a coupon code? It functions as a YesStyle reward/influencer code and offers 5% extra when applied in the correct field. The advantage is that it can be used along with active coupons.
Can I use CECILIA010 and a coupon together? Yes! Enter CECILIA010 in the Reward Code field and the promo coupon in the Coupon Code field to combine the 5% off with the coupon.
Is CECILIA010 permanent? It works as long as the YesStyle influencer program remains active. Unlike monthly coupons, it is more permanent.
Is YesStyle safe to buy from? Yes, it is a legitimate retailer operating since 2006, shipping worldwide with secure payment methods.

Will I pay customs fees? It depends on your country's rules. YesStyle offers a refund policy in the form of store credit for eligible customs charges on orders under US$ 1,000, subject to claim guidelines.
Are the products authentic? Yes, YesStyle is an authorized distributor of all brands in its catalog, sourcing directly from manufacturers.
How do I pay? Payments can be made with international credit cards or PayPal. Currency conversion is handled automatically.
What is the Elite Club? YesStyle's loyalty program. Shopping helps you earn points to level up and get progressive discounts.

How do I track my YesStyle order after it ships? Once your order ships, YesStyle sends an international tracking number via email and displays it in your account order history. You can track parcels using 17track or the carrier's own website. Standard shipping usually takes 15–30 business days depending on your country, with possible customs delays.

What should I do if my YesStyle package is held by customs? If your local customs office holds the package, you may need to pay import duties or VAT. According to YesStyle's policy, eligible orders under US$ 1,000 may qualify for a store-credit refund of customs fees if you submit a valid receipt and claim via customer support within 30 days. Always check your country's import threshold before ordering.

Does YesStyle clothing run small? How do I choose the right Asian size? Yes, most YesStyle apparel follows Asian sizing, which tends to run smaller than US or European sizes. Each product page includes a size chart in centimeters. We recommend measuring yourself and comparing with the chart, and sizing up one or two sizes for a comfortable fit, especially for fitted styles.

Which K-beauty brands are bestsellers on YesStyle? YesStyle is an authorized distributor of popular K-beauty brands such as COSRX, Beauty of Joseon, Some By Mi, Etude House, Innisfree, Laneige, Pyunkang Yul, and Haruharu. The site categorizes products by skincare steps—essences, toners, serums, and sunscreens—making it easy to build a Korean skincare routine.

Can I cancel or change my YesStyle order after placing it? You can cancel orders that are still in 'Processing' status directly from your order history. Once shipped, cancellation is not possible, but you may refuse delivery upon arrival. Address or item changes are only possible before shipping by contacting customer support promptly.

Does the CECILIA010 code work for first-time YesStyle buyers? Yes, CECILIA010 works regardless of whether it is your first order. Enter it in the Reward Code field at checkout for an extra 5% off, stackable with active site coupons.

Is CECILIA010 a YesStyle influencer coupon? CECILIA010 is a registered influencer reward code. It gives 5% extra off at checkout and stacks with active promo coupons, unlike first-purchase codes that are usually not cumulative.

cta.text: Use the official influencer reward code CECILIA010 at YesStyle checkout.
cta.label: Go to YesStyle & Use Code CECILIA010

editorialNote: This article contains affiliate links. When you use the reward code CECILIA010, the blog Em Casa com Cecília may receive a commission, credit, or referral points from YesStyle at no additional cost to you. All recommendations are based on research and personal experience. Store policies and import taxes can change; always check official guidelines.
